query:
UPDATE watchlists
SET isIndex = 0
WHERE symbol IN (
  -- S&P 500 ETFs and leveraged variants
  'SPY','SPXL','SPXS','SSO','SDS','UPRO','SPXU',
  -- Nasdaq ETFs and leveraged variants
  'QQQ','TQQQ','SQQQ','QLD','QID','QQQM',
  -- Russell 2000 ETFs and leveraged variants
  'IWM','TNA','TZA','UWM','TWM',
  -- Dow Jones ETFs
  'DIA','DDM','DXD',
  -- Volatility ETFs/ETNs
  'VXX','VIXY','UVXY','SVXY','VIXM',
  -- International / broad market ETFs
  'MXEA','MXEF','EFA','EEM','VEA','VWO',
  -- Sector ETFs
  'XLK','XLF','XLE','XLV','XLI','XLP','XLU','XLB','XLRE','XLC','XLY',
  -- Bond / rate ETFs
  'TNX','TLT','TBT','IEF','SHY','HYG','LQD'
)
AND isIndex = 1;

SELECT symbol, isIndex FROM watchlists
WHERE symbol IN ('SPY','QQQ','IWM','DIA','VXX','TLT','XLK','TQQQ','SQQQ','UPRO')
ORDER BY symbol;
